_comment: Example part-classification rules for the 파트별 업무 현황 dashboard. Copy this to {stateDir}/classification_rules.json (default ~/.deneb/classification_rules.json) and replace the FAKE names below with the real roster. This file (the .example.json template) ships with fake data ONLY — never commit real person/company names. Lane keys: team1 | team2 | team3 | namdo | personal.
